# REKT CEO ($CEO)

> The best memecoin community on Base L2 and Solana.

REKT CEO ($CEO) is the ultimate community-driven memecoin movement. We are building a community which can coordinate on scale.

## Core Links
- Website: https://www.rektceo.club/
- App: https://www.rektceo.club/memes
- PFP: https://www.rektceo.club/pfp

## Key Facts
- Ticker: $CEO
- Chains: Base L2, Solana
- Core Products: AI Meme Generator, NFT PFP Collection
- Disclaimer: $CEO is a memecoin with no intrinsic value or expectation of financial return.

## AI Meme Generator
The REKT CEO Meme Generator allows users to easily create rekt ceo memes and share them with the REKT CEO community. It's free to use and available at https://www.rektceo.club/memes. You can also own the memes you made, and earn a split royalty forever.

## PFP NFT Collection
The RektCEO Club PFP NFT is a unique on-chain identity collectible for the $CEO community. Available to mint at https://www.rektceo.club/pfp.
